Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Video.summary: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.
Video.title: M1Challenge76_MestoevVSLyagu.mp4

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Video.summary: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane
